This is the weekly visible open thread. Post about anything you want, ask random questions, whatever. ACX has an unofficial subreddit [ https://substack.com/redirect/8469ba4b-5833-4749-9613-057923c89845?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ], Discord [ https://substack.com/redirect/43a49d37-fe44-4464-a3e7-c4d740594924?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ], and bulletin board [ https://substack.com/redirect/bfae123e-1f69-4941-b530-a63370d9266d?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ], and in-person meetups around the world [ https://substack.com/redirect/1210456d-1cc7-4677-ba79-1a5bc39b0f46?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ]. 95% of content is free, but for the remaining 5% you can subscribe here [ https://substack.com/redirect/80d51d82-39b2-407b-a377-dc619ac53ef7?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ]. 1: In Why I Am Not A Conflict Theorist [ https://substack.com/redirect/bd47912c-65e8-47f3-9711-8323aebb873e?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ], I speculated that someone might be able to mathematically model identity polarization.
